description: Testing the visual display and layout of change password interface.

expected_result: + Position, text, text color .... display as designed

item_type: Check input email address into Change password screen
description: Testing password validation, input handling, and successful password change scenarios.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check can change password successfully when
1.  Input Old password the same with DB
2.  New password is valid (※)
3.  Confirm password is the same with New password
4.  Click / Double click Change password button

※ Permitted character in password is defined base on each project
+ Alphabet Letter
+ Number
+ Both Uppercase and LowerCase
+ Special Character (!@#$%^&*()_+....)
+ Space character: at the beginning/middle/end of string
+ Equal to Min value
+ Between Min and Max value
+ Equal to Max value
+ Password is the same with Account 
+ Password is the same with old password
+ Copy/Paste data into Password/New password field
expected_result:
+ Password is changed successfully
+ Update into DB correctly
+ Cannot login with old password
+ Can login with new password

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check change password  when
1.  Input Old password the same with DB
2.  New password is 
+ Input SQL injection 
+ Input HTML (Scripts)
3.  Confirm password is the same with New password
4. Click / Double click Change password button
expected_result:
- Not show system error
- Change password successfully If SQL injection string/HTML is mapped with requirement of password
- Display correct error message and Not process any thing If SQL injection string/HTML is not mapped with requirement of password

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check cannot change password in these cases (Click / Double click Change password button)

1. Old password is blank
2. Old password is different with DB
3. New password is blank
4. New password < Min
5. New password > Max
6. New password use Japanese Character (fullsize, half size), unsupported characters
7. New password not contains any required characters
8. New password and Confirm password are different
9. Confirm password is blank
10. Confirm password < Min
11. Confirm password > Max
12. Confirm password use Japanese Character (fullsize, half size), unsupported characters
13. Confirm password not contains any required characters
expected_result:
+ Show error message, cannot change password
+ Not update DB
+ Can login with old password

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check old password / new password / confirm password when display as hidden
expected_result: Password is hidden by special Character

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check old password / new password / confirm password when click on Eye button

description: Testing login functionality with new and old passwords after password change.

item_type: Check conflict when changing password process is suspended
description: Testing password change behavior during concurrent sessions and account modifications.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check during openning Change password screen and input new password in tab 1 =>   logout in tab 2 => open tab 1 to click Change password button
expected_result: Navigating to login screen [base on each spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check during openning Change password screen and input new password in tab 1 =>   delete account in tab 2 => open tab 1 to click Change password button
expected_result: Navigating to login screen [base on each spec]
